case_title: TEMI AKINTEWE VS. COINBASE GLOBAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF AKINTEWE, TEMI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AKINTEWE, TEMI AS TO DEFENDANT COINBASE GLOBAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TEMI AKINTEWE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT COINBASE GLOBAL INC. IS NOT PRESENT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN HEARING TODAY'S MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25) SERVED SEP-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COINBASE GLOBAL, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF AKINTEWE, TEMI
